builder.specOverrideJson: {"transform":[{"calculate":"datum.ang * 2 * PI - PI","as":"theta"},{"calculate":"datum.x + cos(datum.theta) * datum.rad * 12","as":"px"},{"calculate":"datum.y + sin(datum.theta) * datum.rad * 12","as":"py"}],"mark":{"type":"circle","filled":true},"encoding":{"x":{"field":"px","type":"quantitative","axis":null,"scale":{"nice":false}},"y":{"field":"py","type":"quantitative","axis":null,"scale":{"nice":false,"reverse":true}},"size":{"field":"rad","type":"quantitative","legend":null,"scale":{"range":[45,3]}},"color":{"field":"rad","type":"quantitative","legend":null,"scale":{"range":["#FFE08A","#F15B2A"]}},"opacity":{"field":"rad","type":"quantitative","legend":null,"scale":{"range":[1,0.15]}}}}
